title: Post-Quantum Cryptography and Hybrid Migration · Language Lens: Crypto Go Mlkem
summary: A roadmap replaces every algorithm with one new primitive immediately, ignores harvest-now-decrypt-later exposure, and labels a pending module fully compliant. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the mlkem increment in post-quantum inventory and hybrid migration plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evide…
objectives: Use Go ML-KEM interfaces for key encapsulation with strict key/ciphertext parsing, shared-key custody, failure handling, and hybrid context.
Inventory long-lived confidentiality, authentication, signatures, roots, protocols, dependencies, data lifetime, and migration lead time.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.instruction:
